articles.title: Fuel Prices To Be Reviewed Based On Crude Oil Supply: Suresh Gopi
articles.description: Union Minister Suresh Gopi said fuel prices will be reviewed depending on crude oil availability amid recent supply disruptions caused by the West Asia conflict. Petrol, diesel, and LPG prices have risen in recent weeks, prompting concerns. The final decision will depend on the Petroleum Ministry’s assessment of supply conditions

articles.title: Minor among four apprehended for alleged role in Govindpuri fire that killed three
articles.description: Delhi Police have arrested a 17-year-old girl and three adults in connection with a deadly fire in Govindpuri. The blaze claimed three lives and injured eight people. Investigators believe the fire was deliberately set. A monetary dispute and a personal vendetta are suspected motives. The accused allegedly used petrol and a matchbox to start the fire. Further investigation is ongoing.
